name: Heavy Energy Integration
desc: This ship is optimized for large energy weapons, reducing their OP cost by 10.

name: Hangar Operations Disabled
desc: Non-standard hull design restricts hangar operations, decreasing fighter replacement rate.

name: Integrated Targeting Core
desc: Prototype targeting system improves point defense accuracy at reduced range.

name: Hurricane Ammo Feeder
desc: Specialized subsystems enable extreme ballistic weapon firing rates.

name: Extended Energy Rail (Small)
desc: Enhanced magnetic containment extends range of small energy weapons.

name: Missile Autoloader
desc: Automated systems boost missile reload speed at the cost of Combat Readiness.

name: Cramped Flight Deck
desc: Limited deck space reduces fighter replacement rate (no quality loss).

name: Immobilized Grid System
desc: A specialized design diverging from conventional flux systems, reducing flux buildup through a flux "solidification" mechanism.

name: High-Damper Armor
desc: Reduces damage from low-energy attacks (below 100 DPH) by 50%; 15% reduction for high-energy attacks.

name: Linked Teleportation Module
desc: Enables carrier-style fighter deployment via ship-based teleportation nodes.
